# Digest good example (outline)

## Overview

Two strong shortlist items and one deep-read priority tied to near-term taxonomy workflow experiments.

## Selection rationale

Shortlist prioritizes transfer-ready methods and reproducible resources; one frontier item stays in watchlist due to uncertain applicability.

## Next dialogue prompts

- Which dataset constraints matter most for immediate replication?
- Should we prioritize annotation efficiency over model novelty this week?
